Interface ImplicitElementInfo

All Superinterfaces:
ProgramModelInfo, Service
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultImplicitElementInfo
public interface ImplicitElementInfo extends ProgramModelInfo
Handles requests for implicitly defined program model elements. In particular these are NullType, Package,ArrayType, DefaultConstructor, and ImplicitEnumMethod.
